title: Signal Freshness & Alpha Decay Monitor (All Dimensions incl. Sentiment)
summary: Per-signal rolling IC health dashboard. Tracks Information Coefficient decay for all 9+ signal dimensions including news and social sentiment. Flags dimensions where IC has dropped below threshold — indicating the signal edge has eroded. Auto-reduces weight for decayed signals. 3-day dev, Easy-Medium.
deferral_reason: Covered by research-alpha-decay-chart (in_progress) — deferred during paper_trading_single_account prioritisation
